fields.title: [audit-api] Include ticket dependency counts in default repo audit
[audit-api] Include ticket dependency counts in default repo audit
[audit-api] Include ticket dependency counts in default repo audit

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Repo audit reports dedicated findings when a ticket is waiting on a prerequisite in an earlier workflow state, not just orphan-ticket topology issues. 2. Audit findings reuse the same dependency-convergence model defined by the best-next redesign so counts, state-gap terminology, and affected-dependent reach stay consistent. 3. Default audit output includes machine-readable evidence for prerequisite id or path, dependent id or path, both states, and the relevant convergence metrics. 4. Focused audit-api regression coverage locks both the existing orphan-ticket metric and the new convergence-risk findings.
fields.title: [audit-api] Include dependency convergence findings in default repo audit

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Repo audit reports dedicated findings when a ticket is waiting on a prerequisite in an earlier workflow state, not just orphan-ticket topology issues. 2. Audit findings import the shared ticket-api dependency-convergence model so counts, state-gap terminology, and affected-dependent reach stay consistent. 3. Default audit output includes machine-readable evidence for prerequisite id or path, dependent id or path, both states, and the relevant convergence metrics. 4. Focused audit-api regression coverage locks both the existing orphan-ticket metric and the new convergence-risk findings without reimplementing graph classification locally.

fields.title: [audit-api] Include dependency convergence findings in default repo audit
fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-05-22: cargo test -p audit-api ticket_graph -- --nocapture passed, including the new dependency convergence finding regression. Shared workflow-model validation also passed through ticket-api workflow tests and the focused ticket health consumer test filters.

fields.title: [audit-api] Include dependency convergence findings in default repo audit
fields.validation_summary: Validation on 2026-05-22: cargo test -p audit-api ticket_graph -- --nocapture passed after the audit documentation polish pass. cargo run -p rule-cli --bin rule -- sync-targets --config rule-targets.yaml regenerated the audit readmes, and cargo run -p rule-cli --bin rule -- sync-targets --config rule-targets.yaml --check passed after updating the audit-cli and audit-mcp source-backed README entries and the shared convergence spec traceability.
